content.titre: Everything you need to know before getting started

items.question: How does the 50% tax credit work?
items.reponse: For cleaning in your home, you benefit from a tax credit equal to 50% of the amounts paid (capped at €12,000 per year per household). In practice, an hour billed at €30 actually costs you only €15. SANAD CLEAN works through the Accès SAP cooperative, registered as a home help service, which entitles you to this benefit.

items.question: What is the instant advance?
items.reponse: Thanks to the instant tax-credit advance (URSSAF), you pay only the remaining half right away, without waiting for the following year's tax return. The scheme is managed through the Accès SAP cooperative.

items.question: Does the tax credit apply to office cleaning?
items.reponse: No. The 50% tax credit only applies to services carried out at a private individual's home. Cleaning of commercial premises, deep cleaning and pest control are billed on quote, without a tax credit.

items.question: Which towns do you cover?
items.reponse: We work in Nîmes and the surrounding towns (Caissargues, Marguerittes, Saint-Gilles, Bouillargues, Manduel, Milhaud…). Contact us to confirm your area.

content.sousTitre: Free, no-obligation quote. Quick reply by phone, WhatsApp or email.

content.titre: How your bed bug treatment works

items.texte: We inspect the affected rooms in Nîmes and send a tailored quote.
We apply a targeted treatment room by room to eradicate the infestation.
We advise on prevention and any follow-up visit to confirm the result.

content.intro: We treat bed bugs in Nîmes and the surrounding towns within about 20 km.

items.question: How do I know if I have bed bugs?
items.reponse: Typical signs are small itchy bites in a line, dark spots on the mattress and tiny bugs in seams and bed frames. We can confirm during the inspection.

items.question: How many treatments are needed?
items.reponse: Depending on the level of infestation, one or more visits may be needed. We advise you after the inspection and plan any follow-up.

items.question: How should I prepare the room?
items.reponse: We give you clear instructions before the visit, such as washing bedding at high temperature and decluttering, to make the treatment more effective.

items.question: How is the price set?
items.reponse: Bed bug treatment is priced on quote, based on the number of rooms affected and the severity of the infestation.

content.intro: We treat cockroaches in Nîmes and the surrounding towns within about 20 km.

items.question: Why do I have cockroaches?
items.reponse: Cockroaches are drawn to warmth, moisture and food. They often arrive through pipes, shared walls or packaging and spread quickly if untreated.

items.question: Is one treatment enough?
items.reponse: For light infestations one visit can be enough; heavier infestations may need a follow-up. We advise you after the inspection.

items.question: Is the treatment safe for my family?
items.reponse: Yes, we apply professional products with care and give you clear safety instructions for during and after the treatment.

meta.title: Frequently asked questions
meta.description: Tax credit, instant advance, CESU, service area, products, quotes: all the answers about cleaning and housekeeping with SANAD CLEAN.

content.titre: Everything you need to know before getting started

items.question: How does the 50% tax credit work?
items.reponse: For cleaning in your home, you benefit from a tax credit equal to 50% of the amounts paid (capped at €12,000 per year per household). In practice, an hour billed at €30 actually costs you only €15. SANAD CLEAN works through the Accès SAP cooperative, registered as a home help service, which entitles you to this benefit.

items.question: What is the instant advance?
items.reponse: Thanks to the instant tax-credit advance (URSSAF), you pay only the remaining half right away, without waiting for the following year's tax return. The scheme is managed through the Accès SAP cooperative.

items.question: Does the tax credit apply to office cleaning?
items.reponse: No. The 50% tax credit only applies to services carried out at a private individual's home. Cleaning of commercial premises, deep cleaning and pest control are billed on quote, without a tax credit.

items.question: Which towns do you cover?
items.reponse: We work in Nîmes and the surrounding towns (Caissargues, Marguerittes, Saint-Gilles, Bouillargues, Manduel, Milhaud…). Contact us to confirm your area.

items.question: Can I pay with CESU?
items.reponse: Yes, CESU payment is accepted for home cleaning. With the tax credit, your real cost comes to €15/h.

items.question: Do you use eco-friendly products?
items.reponse: We adapt our products to your preferences and can use environmentally friendly products on request, especially around children or pets.

content.sousTitre: Call us or write: we'll reply quickly.
